## Summary
- [ ] Briefly describe what changed and why.

## Branching convention
- [ ] Branch name follows `<type>/<short-description>` (example: `feat/phase0-a11y-ci`)

## Accessibility Definition of Done checklist
- [ ] Semantic HTML with correct landmarks and heading order
- [ ] Fully keyboard operable; visible focus; no keyboard traps
- [ ] Names, roles, and values are exposed to assistive technologies
- [ ] Contrast is at least 4.5:1 for normal text and 3:1 for large text/UI
- [ ] Forms include programmatic labels and accessible error messaging
- [ ] Automated accessibility suite is green
- [ ] No new W3C validation errors
